$comment: Unified event envelope — every connector normalizes into this shape before the bus. Machine-checked by tools/pii_scrub.py --check and your schema registry.

event_id.description: globally unique; content-hash based so replays dedup

system.description: e.g. helpdesk / crm / chat / erp / ci

channel.description: sub-channel within the system, if any

connector_version.description: schema drift is caught by pinning this

kind.description: org-level taxonomy: message / ticket / transaction / incident / document / metric

actor_ref.description: opaque reference to the acting identity (① substrate), never inline personal data

payload.description: source-specific body. All free-text fields MUST have passed the PII scrubber.

pii_scrubbed.description: set true by the scrubber only; events with false are quarantined, never persisted

dedup_key.description: cross-channel key: the same real-world signal via two channels shares this
